name: Cocoa Almond Biscotti LF
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, cocoa and baking powder. Stir to mix well. Add the chopped almonds if desired and stir to mix. Add the remaining ingredients and stir just until the dough holds together.
2. Turn the dough onto a lightly floured surface and shape into two 8 x 2 inch logs. If the dough is too sticky to handle, knead in a little more flour. Flatten out the logs slightly so that the crust will not split or crack. Place the logs on a baking sheet coated with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Bake at 350 degrees F for about 23 minutes, or until lightly browned. Transfer the logs to a wire rack and allow to cool for 10 minutes.
4. Place the logs on a cutting board and use a serrated knife to slice the logs diagonally into 1/2 inch thick slices. Place the slices on a baking sheet and bake at 300 degrees F for 20 minutes or until lightly browned, turning after 10 minutes.
5. Transfer the biscotti to wire racks and allow to cool completely before serving. Enjoy!
